milestone: View Mode indicator mirrored into the header bar
slice: View Mode (Build 0055) was only visible via the full-width banner below the header and via disabled Check & Build/Publish buttons -- nothing in the header bar itself said "this is read-only," where a creator is already looking at World name and Save/Backup status. Adds a matching "View Only" chip beside "All Changes Saved"/"Backed up", same visibility rule (currentProjectReadOnly), same read-only red as the banner below.
